title: Police find feathers worth R2m
description: KAROO NEWS - A tip-off about stolen ostrich...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KAROO NEWS - A tip-off about stolen ostrich feathers from Oudtshoorn en route to Cradock, led to the recovery of millions of rand worth of feathers on Friday 26 July.","html":"KAROO NEWS - A tip-off about stolen ostrich feathers from Oudtshoorn en route to Cradock, led to the recovery of millions of rand worth of feathers on Friday 26 July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Following the information, the Cradock K9 unit, Cradock SAPS Vispol members, Oudtshoorn's stock theft unit and CDK Security with the help of Navic Cloud, intercepted a Toyota LDV and a White Isuzu KB LDV in J A Calata Street in Cradock."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two bags filled with feathers were found and police arrested the drivers and seized the vehicles.","html":"Two bags filled with feathers were found and police arrested the drivers and seized the vehicles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The value of the suspected stolen ostrich feathers is estimated at R2-million.","html":"The value of the suspected stolen ostrich feathers is estimated at R2-million."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two bags filled with feathers were found.","html":"Two bags filled with feathers were found."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The roadblock where the ostrich feathers were found.","html":"The roadblock where the ostrich feathers were found."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vehicles being searched.","html":"Vehicles being searched."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photos: CDK Security","html":"Photos: CDK Security"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
